title: Feel Complete | 200g Fine & Dry Celtic Sea Salt | No Need To Grind | Organic Approved | Essential Minerals & Electrolytes | Natural Alternative To Table Salt | Lab Tested
features: No Grinding Required: Fine crystals for easy, ready-to-use consistency.
Delicious Taste: Enjoy the delightful flavour in all your favourite recipes.
Lower Sodium: A healthier choice with reduced sodium content.
description: Product Description Celtic Sea Salt Pure. Natural. Taste. Regular table salt is typically stripped of minerals, bleached and mixed with unnatural anti-caking agents. Our Celtic Sea Salt is hand-harvested on the french coast using ancient practices and packaged in England. Naturally lower in sodium than table salt, each crystal absorbs the earth's essence, capturing essential minerals. Finely ground and pure in taste, enhance every meal with added minerals like magnesium, zinc and potassium. Light grey in colour, encapsulating the essence of the Celtic Sea in each grain, with no additives. 100% Natural Delicious depth of flavour Fine crystals - no need to grind Less sodium than table salt UK brand Perfect for cooking, baking and finishing hand-harvested on the French coast using ancient practices and packaged in England up to 82 essential minerals Ingredients Celtic Sea Salt (100%) Warnings Packaged in a facility that also handles allergens. Storage Store in a cool, dry place away from direct sunlight. Keep out of reach of children. Perfect for Cooking, baking and finishing
